anatomy.description: Pill-shaped container (border-radius: 9999px). Height: 24px. Padding and background depend on type.
Leading icon, 16px. Decorative (aria-hidden). Icon name and color depend on type.
Fixed text string. Manrope SemiBold, 12px, whitespace-nowrap. Color depends on type.

types.name: bookable
types.semantics: The venue is fully bookable — users can complete a booking directly without waiting for confirmation.
types.label: Bookable

types.name: request only
types.semantics: The venue requires a booking request — users submit a request and the venue must confirm availability before the booking is complete.
types.label: Request only

variantNote: No structural variants. Type is the only dimension (2 types).
sizeNote: Single size only — height 24px. No size variants.

typography.note: Both types share the same text style as the main Badge.

usageContext: Communicates booking capability: direct booking (bookable) or request-based (request only).
notes: Two confirmed types: bookable (7477:1866) and request only (7477:1878).
Both types use chart-pair tokens, not the notification tokens used by main Badge.
The bookable type has asymmetric horizontal padding: left 8px, right 12px.
The request only type has symmetric horizontal padding: 8px.
Icon and text share the same color token per type.
Icon is decorative — must have aria-hidden='true'.
